title: Liquid / gas separator and centrifugal motor compressor unit equipped with such a separator
abstract: This liquid / gas separator for centrifugal motor compressor includes a sump (8) internally equipped with at least one gas separator stage (10, 11) suitable to separate a gaseous phase from a liquid phase accepted in sump entry. The sump (8) internally includes a compartment (13) in which flows the gaseous phase separated by said separator stage (10, 11) and in which is assembled a compressor stage (4) of the motor compressor (1).
claims: Claims 1. Liquid / gas separator for centrifugal motor compressor, including a sump (8) equipped with at least one gas separator stage (10, 11) likely to separate a gaseous phase and a liquid phase accepted in entry in the sump, characterised so that the sump (8) internally includes a compartment (13) in which flows the gaseous phase separated by said stage (10, 11) and in which is assembled a compressor stage (4) of the motor compressor (1) configured for receiving at least one part of the separated gaseous phase. 2. Separator according to claim 1, in which the compartment is blocked by a blockage slab (14) joint to the motor compressor (1) and fixed to the sump (8). 3. Separator according to claim 2, in which the compartment (13) is an airtight compartment vis-a-vis the exterior of the sumo, an airtight seal (15) being placed between the blockage slab and the sump. 4. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 3, in which the compartment includes a diameter higher than that of the rest of the sump. 5. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 4, in which the sump internally includes the guidance methods (16) of the gaseous phase in the compartment, at the place where an entry of the compressor stage has been assembled. 6. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 5, including the cooling methods (17) of a recirculated gas and / or, of a backflow gas in upstream by a motor compressor or of another gas handled by the motor compressor, said means of cooling being provided around the sump. 7. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 6, in which the separator is positioned vertically. 8. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 7, including a single compressor stage. 9. Separator according to any one of the claims 1 to 8, including at least one separator chosen among a cyclonic, double bend or inertiel separators. 10. Centrifugal motor compressor unit, including a motor compressor (1) including a motor means (3) leading a compressor in rotation (4), characterised in that which includes a liquid / gas separator (2) according to one of the claims 1 to 9, said compressor being integrated in the separator (2). 11. Motor compressor unit according to claim 10, including a set of active magnetic bearings axially and radially supporting the tree line of the motor compressor. 12. Motor compressor unit according to claim 10 and 11 , in which the compressor is an axial backflow compressor and includes a curved output suitable to allow the extraction of the compressor 13. Motor compressor unit according to claim 12, in which the motor means and the compressor are assembled in a common sump airtight against the gas handled by the motor compressor fixed in an airtight manner in the sump of the separator. 14. Motor compressor unit according toany one of the claims 10 to 12, in which the compressor is a radial backflow compressor and includes a radial output, all of it including the motor mean and a wheel with compression blades of the compressor constituting a set that can be dismantled. 15. Motor compressor unit according to any one of the claims 10 to 14, including, assembled in a common sump, a motor compressor set, a separator, double wall cooling methods, an anti-pumping valve, and methods of control of the motor compressor unit.
